failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items, even though the tool returned two matching items above the requested price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned count=2 with two available Mechanical Keyboard items, both with RGB backlight and prices 272.33 and 237.48, which are greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not corrected later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
